title: demorchis umbrosa
intro: Demorchis umbrosa, also known as the green flowered demorchis, is a type of orchid plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Demorchis umbrosa is primarily used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Demorchis umbrosa include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. Demorchis umbrosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed as a tea or used topically as a poultice to reap its medicinal benefits.
